productDisplayName: Peter England Men Leather Brown Belt
description: A formal essential, a belt is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. peter england have perfected this traditional accessory's foray into modern wardrobes with classic techniques and innovative designs. Wear this piece with formal trousers, formal shoes and crisp long sleeved shirts. Length: 95 cm Made of leather Tang clasp for a snug Fit Holes to customise fit Fixed metal loop to hold belt in place Cut out hole designs for styling Care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in sunlight
